protocols.Paper_title: Biological characteristics and whole-genome analysis of the potential probiotic, Lactobacillus reuteri S5
Biological characteristics and whole-genome analysis of the Lactobacillus reuteri potential probiotic, S5
protocols.Evidence: Whole-genome sequencing prep used B1 lysate and B2 lysis buffer, included centrifugation and column/ethanol washes, then DNA library sequencing.
